acceptanceSignals: Monthly close generates immutable cycle snapshots with deterministic totals.
HR export includes required exception classes and reconciliation metadata.
Re-run behavior for same cycle is idempotent unless authorized unlock occurs.

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: Monthly Settlement and HR Export in 0 attempts

lastCommit.message: feat: implement Monthly Settlement and HR Export (attempt 5)

reinforcementResults.name: HTTP Contract Sync Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: The current feature satisfies the active HTTP contract policy: new/changed formal routes are synchronized across runtime route catalog, OpenAPI (`contract/openapi/openapi.yaml`/`.json`), and generated TS client artifacts (`contract/generated/ts-client/...`), and contract tests were updated to enforce route-to-spec parity plus error response/schema expectations for the new monthly settlement and retention endpoints.

reinforcementResults.name: High-Risk Write Audit Discipline
reinforcementResults.summary: Monthly settlement and HR export satisfy the active policy: close/export/lock/unlock/sync write paths append immutable audit evidence with actorId, role, entityId, reason, timestamp, and correlationId; monthly close uses fixed Taipei cycle boundaries; SFTP batch is the mandatory close output path with HR API as adjunct; and same-cycle reruns are idempotent unless an authorized unlock with explicit reason occurs.

reinforcementResults.name: No Legacy Path Rule
reinforcementResults.summary: The current implementation satisfies this feature’s active policy: monthly close is derived from fixed Asia/Taipei boundaries, settlement output is SFTP batch with reconciliation and required exception-class metadata, same-cycle reruns are idempotent while locked, and recomputation requires authorized unlock with explicit audit reason. No manual CSV close channel or fallback close path is present in the active contract/handlers for this feature.

reinforcementResults.name: Financial Close Integrity Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: The current workspace satisfies the active settlement policy for this feature: monthly close uses Asia/Taipei cycle boundaries and defaults to previous month; settlement outputs are SFTP-batch based with cycle key plus snapshot checksum and reconciliation metadata; required exception classes are included (refund, deduction failure, terminated employee, plus disputed); same-cycle reruns are idempotent; and recomputation requires explicit committee-authorized unlock reason with audit-linked lock/unlock receipts.

reinforcementResults.name: Data Retention Enforcement
reinforcementResults.summary: The current feature satisfies the active policy: monthly settlement closes on Taipei cycle boundaries with mandatory SFTP snapshot output, deterministic/idempotent cycle behavior with reasoned lock/unlock governance, and implemented payroll/order/audit retention purge workflows (including scheduled jobs and audit-query traceability). Sensitive payroll export and audit snapshot fields are encrypted, and role-based access control plus purge/encryption behavior are covered by tests.

excludedApproaches: Using manual CSV ingestion as official close channel.
Using non-Taipei date boundaries for monthly cycle calculations.
Allowing unlocked recomputation without audit reason.
executionConstraints: Run monthly settlement on fixed Asia/Taipei cycle boundaries.
Use SFTP batch export as mandatory settlement output path; API sync can complement.
Support lock/unlock with explicit reason and immutable close snapshots.
name: Monthly Settlement and HR Export
rationale: Automated close and exception handling are first-phase governance requirements.
summary: Automate monthly financial close, export, and exception processing.
